DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mark D. Fenske of EMARD DANOFF PORT TAMULSKI & PAETZOLD LLP (415-227-9455), appearing for defendants / moving parties Alcoa, Inc., American President Lines, Ltd. and Matson Navigation Company, Inc.
Michael Eyerly of DEBLASE BROWN EYERLY LLP (310-575-9955), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Judith Lavonne Carter, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANTS ALCOA, INC., AMERICAN PRESIDENT LINES, LTD., MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT

Pursuant to both counsel's representation, the Court vacated its ruling and took defendants Alcoa, Inc., American President Lines, Ltd. and Matson Navigation Company, Inc.'s motion to strike off calendar. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mark D. Fenske of EMARD DANOFF PORT TAMULSKI & PAETZOLD LLP (415-227-9455), appearing for defendants / moving parties Alcoa, Inc., American President Lines, Ltd. and Matson Navigation Company, Inc.
Michael Eyerly of DEBLASE BROWN EYERLY LLP (310-575-9955), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Judith Lavonne Carter, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANTS ALCOA, INC., AMERICAN PRESIDENT LINES, LTD., MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES

Pursuant to both counsel's representation, the Court vacated its ruling and took defendants Alcoa, Inc., American President Lines, Ltd. and Matson Navigation Company, Inc.'s demurrer off calendar. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
